message:
chore(beads): mark franken_networkx-i4b8 (conversion view dict factory parity) as in_progress

Updates .beads/issues.jsonl to flip the parity-task bead for top-level
`to_undirected()` / `to_directed()` live views exposing the NetworkX
dict-factory attribute surface (adjlist_inner_dict_factory,
adjlist_outer_dict_factory, edge_attr_dict_factory,
graph_attr_dict_factory, node_attr_dict_factory, node_dict_factory)
from `closed` back to `in_progress` with a refreshed updated_at and
close_reason cleared, reflecting that further follow-up work has been
identified on this parity surface.

No code changes; this is a pure beads/JSONL state change to keep
`br ready` output honest about what is actually in-flight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
